{{Infobox location
| name = Amorenthus
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Amorenthus]] is one of the [[Vroshir]] homeworlds.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Amorenthus]] is described as an idyllic paradise with rainbow skies, floating islands, and shining water.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Amorenthus]] is a stronghold.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Amorenthus]] has a network of satellites and guardians.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Nations and empires]]
